title: Worley Supports AquaDuctus Offshore Hydrogen Pipeline in the German North Sea
content: Worley has officially stepped up to support the ambitious AquaDuctus offshore hydrogen pipeline, a massive leap forward in Europeâ€™s energy transition. This project is set to become a vital artery for clean energy, transporting green hydrogen produced from wind farms in the North Sea directly to the German mainland. By providing essential engineering and design services, Worley is helping to lay the groundwork for what will eventually be one of the worldâ€™s most significant hydrogen infrastructures. The AquaDuctus pipeline is designed to carry up to one million tonnes of green hydrogen annually by 2035, playing a crucial role in decarbonizing heavy industry and meeting climate targets. This collaboration highlights the growing momentum behind large scale hydrogen solutions and demonstrates Worleyâ€™s commitment to delivering complex sustainable energy projects. As the world shifts away from fossil fuels, this pipeline represents a bold vision for a zero carbon future, connecting offshore wind power with onshore demand centers. It is a game changing development for the European hydrogen backbone, ensuring that green molecules can reach the heart of industrial production efficiently.
author: Analysts Account
